title: Barfi!
tmdbOverview: The heartwarming tale of Barfi, a charming deaf-mute young man from 1970s Darjeeling, and two unalike women who can't help but fall for him.
synopsis: Barfi! is a 2012 drama, romance and comedy film from India. It's highly rated, holding a strong 8.1 on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a PG certification (AU rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
